stemHtml: The required navigation performance of RNP 4 operations is...

options.a: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 90 percent containment basis.
options.b: Plus or minus 4 miles on a 90 percent containment basis.
options.c: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 95 percent containment basis.
options.d: Plus or minus 4 NM on a 98 percent containment basis.
